title: Kirby's Adventure Vegetable Valley on Mario Paint Composer
description:
My entry to Levus28's contest. This contest is more my style, in terms of song choice and ruleset, so I decided to participate.
This song came out quite well, but the recoding and editing didn't go so well. The video is behind the audio and the Windows Movie Makers kind of screwed with the transitions and no matter how much I tweaked them it didn't come out great, but it's not that bad. I hope you like my submission to my first contest.
